subject: Physics
title: Frame Dragging
description: Learn Frame Dragging in one minute.

hook.text: A spinning object doesn't just warp spacetime—it drags spacetime around with it, like stirring honey.

buildup.text: Einstein's equations predicted that rotating masses twist the fabric of space in their direction.

discovery.text: NASA's Gravity Probe B confirmed frame dragging in 2011 after 50 years of planning and building.

twist.text: The effect was tiny—Earth drags space by just 0.000011 degrees per year. But it was measurable.

climax.text: Near spinning black holes, frame dragging becomes violent—space itself is whipped around.

punchline.text: Spin a planet and spacetime swirls with it. Gravity gets creative.

quiz.question: What is frame dragging?
options: A spinning mass drags spacetime in its rotation direction
Objects fall faster near spinning planets
Light curves more near rotating objects
